content.text: yes — Mira has a **confirmed egg allergy** (mild hives), verified by your pediatric office at Riverdale Pediatrics, so that's the one to flag clearly to any new caregiver. it's worth writing it down explicitly on a handoff note — something like "no egg or egg-containing foods; reaction is mild hives but confirmed by her doctor" — so there's no ambiguity in the moment. as a next step, it's a good idea to ask Riverdale Pediatrics whether they'd recommend keeping a children's antihistamine on hand and, if so, the right dose for Mira's current weight, so the caregiver has a clear plan if accidental exposure ever happens.
